resolveProjectRoot.description: Worktree-aware project root resolution, extracted from plan.cjs to core.cjs as the single canonical resolver.

dagExistenceCheck.description: Validates DAG.json exists at the project root before merge operations. Throws descriptive error with remediation steps if missing.

worktree-transparent-root.description: resolveProjectRoot() returns identical path whether called from main repo, a worktree, or a nested subdirectory of either

dag-generated-on-new-version.description: /new-version skill calls dag generate after STATE.json is written, ensuring DAG.json always exists for subsequent merge operations

definition.scope: Consolidate project root resolution to a single worktree-aware function in core.cjs, fix DAG.json path resolution in merge operations, and ensure DAG generation happens during /new-version.

tasks.description: Extract resolveProjectRoot() from plan.cjs to core.cjs
tasks.acceptance: Function exists in core.cjs and plan.cjs imports from core.cjs

tasks.description: Replace all findProjectRoot() calls with resolveProjectRoot()
tasks.acceptance: No remaining calls to findProjectRoot in codebase

tasks.description: Add DAG existence validation before merge
Unit tests for path resolution and DAG scenarios
tasks.acceptance: Tests cover worktree, non-worktree, and missing-DAG cases

acceptance: All merge operations find DAG.json regardless of working directory
resolveProjectRoot() is the single path resolver across the codebase
